calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Michael Begert; Clerk: SRavinantapricha; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, George Choi Ng is present. Represented by Jenny Peng
Attorney, Daniel Cheung, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Derrick Lee Yano and Jennifer Nakano are present.
Attorney, Nathaniel Bigger, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Gutierrez, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.
No report back to Dept. 514 regarding the status of the settlement, matter is taken off calendar. The trial date of SEP-26-2011 remains on calendar.
